rulings.Case Title: WAYNE CHAN VS. CHEUN HEE LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 12, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT MYOUNG LEE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege, if Plaintiff is able to do so, any basis for recovery against Ms. Lee other than community property. Contrary to Plaintiff's allegation on complaint, Mr. Lee's petition does not establish "that there were assets that were not disclosed and therefore never divided. Judicially noticeable documents, September 8, 200 Judgment and July 27, 2016 Order, establish that marriage (and community) was dissolved prior to the debt being incurred by Mr. Lee. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS ROLIZ-MAGUIGAD VS. K5 FAMILY LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause As To Why Defendant Should Not Be Enjoined From Enforcing The Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 12, 2018 line 8. Order To Show Cause As To Why Defendant Should Not Be Enjoined From Enforcing The Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden and show likelihood of prevailing on the merits on any causes of action as alleged in the operative complaint. See Kauffman v. Goldman (2011) 195 Cal.App.4th 734. Additionally, the existence of bona fide tenancy and applicability of SFRO is not shown by competent, admissible, non-self serving evidence. Plaintiff also failed to establish harm that cannot be compensated by money-damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAOWEN LI AND YONG LIANG, TRANSFEREES, ET AL VS. JAMES D. BANKS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 12, 2018 line 9. PLAINTIFF COURTHOUSE VENTURES INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QUIRING PROPERTIES VS. MALACHY O'BRIEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 12, 2018 line 10. DEFENDANT MALACHY O'BRIEN DEMURRER to COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile allegations in Complaint that the tenancy being terminated is commercial (by inference as paragraphs 6e, 6f, and 14 are left blank, and Civil Case Cover sheet "commercial" box is checked) with allegation in the Notice (incorporated by reference) that "performance for possession is sought pursuant to" SFRO. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QUIRING PROPERTIES VS. MALACHY O'BRIEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 12, 2018 line 10. DEFENDANT MALACHY O'BRIEN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. To the extent Motion to Strike is based on the same successful argument as demurrer it is GRANTED as stated above. Motion is DENIED on all other grounds. = (501/REQ)
